✂ Crop
⟺ Mirror

◐ Contrast
🎨 Normalize colors

▣ Border
↻ Rotate
⤡ Scale / resize
T Text / logo

photo.jpg
Add file

Drop image or click to open

png · jpg · gif · webp · tiff · bmp

Convert — options
CLI preview
magick photo.jpg -quality 85 -strip -profile sRGB ./output/photo_out.png
photo.jpg 3840 × 2160 4.2 MB
ImageMagick 7.1
